--- 
title: "Seminar Notes 2026"
author: "Yi Zhou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
# url: your book url like https://bookdown.org/yihui/bookdown
# cover-image: path to the social sharing image like images/cover.jpg
# description: |
#   This is a minimal example of using the bookdown package to write a book.
#   The HTML output format for this example is bookdown::gitbook,
#   set in the _output.yml file.
link-citations: yes
github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
---

# 資料{-}

## スケジュール{-}

[Click here to download XLSX](Schedule2026.xlsx) 

## 参考資料{-}

  - Statistical Inference [Click here to open PDF](Textbook/Casella_Berger_Statistical_Inference.pdf)
    - 現代数理統計学 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000105174;jsessionid=77611339D268556CDFB560D03E30F354?0)
    - 現代数理統計学の基礎 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000050917?2)
    - 一般化線形モデル [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000031957?19)
    - ベイズ計算統計学 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000027079?21)

  - Fundamentals of Biostatistics [Click here to open PDF](Textbook/Fundamentals of Biostatistics (8th Edition).pdf)
    - 医学統計学ハンドブック [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000068387?3)
    - 生存時間解析 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000117213?16)
    - 実験計画法と分散分析 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000027080?23)
    
  - An introduction to statistical learning 
    - with application in Python [Click here to open PDF](Textbook/ISLP_pyhton.pdf)
    - with application in R [Click here to open PDF](Textbook/ISLR_R.pdf)
    
  - 統計的因果推論 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000034381?17)
    - 欠測データの統計解析 [Link to Kobe Univ. Lib](https://elib.maruzen.co.jp/elib/html/BookDetail/Id/3000031956?18)
    
  - Others [Click here to open folder](Textbook/.)
  
  
## 数理科学入門Slides{-}

  - Slides [Click here to open PDF](Stats-slides/allslides.pdf)
  - Notes [Click here to open PDF](Stats-slides/allnotes.pdf)
  - Others [Click here to open folder](Stats-slides/.)

## R{-}

  - R and RStudio installation: [https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/](https://posit.co/download/rstudio-desktop/)
  - 授業の資料：[https://lec25.github.io/2026-1H609/](https://lec25.github.io/2026-1H609/)
